data.title: S&P 500 Energy Sector Reaches 13-Month High with Recent Gains
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the S&P 500 energy sector has achieved its highest level in over 13 months, experiencing a recent increase of 2%. This marks a significant milestone for the sector, reflecting positive momentum in the market.

data.title: Old Glory Bank to Go Public Through SPAC Deal Valued at $250 Million
data.description: According to PANews, U.S.-based Old Glory Bank, known for its crypto-friendly approach, is set to go public through a SPAC transaction with Digital Asset Acquisition Corp., valued at $250 million. The deal includes $176 million in SPAC funds and at least $50 million in private investment. Old Glory aims to fully integrate crypto assets into traditional banking services and plans to list on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol 'OGB.'

data.title: Federal Reserve's Mossala: There is currently no need for further interest rate cuts.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Mohamed Mussaleem stated that inflation risks are easing, and he expects prices to begin returning to the Fed's target later this year. Mussaleem noted that after last year's rate cuts, the Fed's monetary policy is well-positioned to address risks to price stability or employment. He stated that current interest rates are close to neutral, meaning they neither stimulate nor inhibit the economy, and reiterated that there is no need for further rate cuts given that inflation remains high. "I expect inflation to move back towards our 2% target this year. Today's inflation data is encouraging in this regard," Mussaleem said on Tuesday. "I think the current policy positioning is very appropriate, balancing the expected path of the economy while also taking into account various risks." (Jinshi)

data.title: Franklin Templeton transforms its money market fund into a stablecoin reserve instrument
data.description: Franklin Templeton announced the compatibility of its two institutional money market funds with blockchain finance, aiming to position them for the growing market of tokenized assets and regulated stablecoins. This update applies to the Western Asset Institutional Treasury Obligations Fund (LUIXX) and the Western Asset Institutional Treasury Reserves Fund (DIGXX), both managed by its subsidiary, Western Asset Management. Roger Bayston, Head of Digital Assets at Franklin Templeton, stated that traditional funds are already moving onto the blockchain, so the focus is on making them more accessible to a wider audience. The LUIXX fund has been modified to comply with the GENIUS Act, which sets reserve standards for regulated stablecoins. The fund currently holds only short-term U.S. Treasury securities with maturities of less than 93 days, which can be used as a stablecoin reserve instrument. The DIGXX fund has launched a digital institutional equity class designed specifically for distribution on blockchain platforms, allowing approved intermediaries to record and transfer ownership of fund shares on-chain. (CoinDesk)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 920 USDT with a 1.63% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 13, 2026, 16:07 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 920 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 920.01001 USDT, with a narrowed 1.63% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Solana Treasury's Upexi has reached a securities purchase agreement to raise $36 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Solana treasury company Upexi announced a securities purchase agreement with Hivemind Capital Partners to raise $36 million. The offering is expected to close around January 14, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions. The notes are backed by locked SOL tokens and will be incorporated into the company's Solana treasury upon completion of the transaction. This deal is expected to increase Upexi's SOL holdings by 12% to over 2.4 million SOL, making it the second-largest corporate SOL holder after Forward Industries, which holds 6.9 million SOL. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Trump: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell is either incompetent or dishonest
data.description: US President Trump stated that Federal Reserve Chairman Powell is either incompetent or dishonest. Powell has not done a good job. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump Criticizes Federal Reserve Chair Powell's Competence and Integrity
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed strong criticism of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, stating that Powell is either incompetent or lacks integrity. Trump remarked that Powell's performance in his role has been unsatisfactory. Meanwhile, U.S. House Speaker Johnson commented that if Powell is innocent, the investigation will reveal the truth. Johnson emphasized the necessity for the Department of Justice to continue its investigation into Powell.

data.title: JustLend DAO Reports Significant Growth in Total Value Locked
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the latest weekly report from JustLend DAO, a leading decentralized lending protocol on the TRON network, reveals that the platform's total value locked has surpassed $6.92 billion. The deposit volume has reached $4.15 billion, while the total borrowing amount stands at $215 million. As a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem, JustLend DAO is demonstrating robust growth in the DeFi market, providing efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: Coinbase opens Jupiter (JUPITER) trading to users in New York State
data.description: Coinbase announced that Jupiter (JUPITER) is now available for trading to New York State residents. Users can buy, sell, convert, store, and transfer funds through the website and mobile app. Coinbase holds a virtual currency business license issued by the New York State Department of Financial Services.

data.title: Ethereum's Role in On-Chain Real-World Asset Settlement Highlighted
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum has been identified as a key platform for on-chain real-world asset settlement, as reported by Ethereum's official source citing data from @RWA_xyz. Ondo Finance, which issues on-chain physical assets such as stocks, ETFs, and government bonds, has approximately 77% of its total value locked (TVL) deployed on Ethereum. This accounts for about 11.6% of the total TVL in Ethereum's real-world asset sector, underscoring Ethereum's central role in this domain.
